title: 弥生賞の後に・次こそ絶対！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket loses to Narita Taishin and cries in
frustration at her defeat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taishin, though reluctant to admit it, seems to
have gained a new respect for Ticket's
wholehearted efforts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket begins training once again, in
order to win against her rivals at the Satsuki Sho.
